reference_group.reference: Yang Xiao, Takeichi, N., Shida, K., Tanaka, H., Kuriyama, N., Sakai, T. "Novel Mg-Zr-A-H (A=Li, Na) hydrides synthesized by a high pressure technique and their hydrogen storage properties". J. Alloys Compd. 2011, 509, 1211.

pdf_data.database_comments: ANX: N. Analysis: Zr1. Formula From Original Source: Zr. ICSD Collection Code: 169452. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: Structure refinement by Rietveld method. Structure determination using synchrotron radiation (powder). This is a phase component (2.2wt.%) of the system: 6MgH2+ZrH2. In the system 6MgH2+ZrH2+0.7LiH Zr (1.0wt%) has a=3.65682, R=0.0109 ; in the system 6MgH2+ZrH2+1.0LiH Zr (4.3wt%) has a=3.65682, R=0.0059. In the system 6MgH2+ZrH2+0.3NaH Zr content is 2.3wt%, a=3.67406, R=0.0054. Article Title: Novel Mg-Zr-A-H (A=Li, Na) hydrides synthesized by a high pressure technique and their hydrogen storage properties. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
